name: Crab Meat and Mushrooms in Wine Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 large can of mushrooms (stems and pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pull crab meat apart and remove stiff membranes.
2. Saute mushrooms in butter. (If using canned mushrooms, add them later.)
3. Make a cream sauce by blending melted butter, flour, milk, white wine, mustard, tarragon, salt, pepper, and hot sauce.
4. Cook the sauce for 2-3 minutes, then add crab meat and mushrooms.
5. Place in a casserole dish; sprinkle top with bread crumbs and dot with butter.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes uncovered. Cover before serving.
7. This can also be made with shrimp or crab meat and shrimp.
